issues.claim: brāhmī sthiti and brahma-nirvāṇa are not engineering-translatable; they name the state in Brahman and terminal liberation, which sit outside the operational layer
issues.objection: This is the right scope-honest move. The engineering layer correctly tags STRETCHED, scopes the analog to the operational rung (the senior's career-state stability), and explicitly identifies the metaphysical reach as exceeding what the engineering analog can travel. Three precisions: (1) brāhmī is the feminine adjective form (relating to Brahman) — the engineering layer renders it accurately; (2) sthiti is grammatically the noun the adjective modifies — the engineering layer correctly renders 'state'; (3) brahma-nirvāṇa is the heaviest compound in the chapter — the source pack records all three traditional readings (Advaita: Brahman-identification mokṣa; Vishishtadvaita: cessation-plus-entry; Gaudiya: Vaikuṇṭha) and the engineering layer correctly does not pick one. Acceptable scope-honest treatment.

notes: The engineering layer correctly preserves: (a) the scope-mismatch between brāhmī sthiti / brahma-nirvāṇa metaphysics and the engineering layer — this is the verse where scope-honesty is most critical; (b) the chapter-closing structural function — eṣā ('this') refers back over the entire chapter's argument from 2.11 to 2.71, which the engineering layer renders 'eṣā — this — refers back over the chapter's whole argument from 2.11 to 2.71'; (c) the doctrinal axes preserved at the source-pack level (Advaita / Vishishtadvaita / Gaudiya) without flattening; (d) the anta-kāle 'pi structural force (even brief establishment at end-of-life suffices) translated to 'Even brief establishment carries through to the closing scenes of a career'; (e) the falsifiability clause that explicitly closes the misread that engineering tenure produces brāhmī-sthiti; (f) the counter-example acknowledging that stability hardened into closure is not the verse. The STRETCHED tag and MEDIUM confidence honestly mark the metaphysical reach. This is the model treatment for a metaphysically maximally loaded verse. Pass.
